description: JSON Schema for Cisco AI Pods.
title: Cisco AI Pods

abstract.dns_servers.description: List of DNS Servers.  Can be IPv4 or IPv6 addresses
abstract.dns_servers.title: DNS Servers

abstract.dns_1123_label.description: Most Objects (Namespaces, Pods, Services, Routes): OpenShift Limits this to 49 characters max.
abstract.dns_1123_label.title: DNS 1123 Label

abstract.dns_1123_subdomain.description: Most Objects (Namespaces, Pods, Services, Routes): OpenShift Limits this to 253 characters max.
abstract.dns_1123_subdomain.title: DNS 1123 Subdomain

ipv4_or_ipv6_address.description: Default is `198.18.0.1`.  IPv4 or IPv6 Address.
ipv4_or_ipv6_address.title: IPv4 or IPv6 Address

ipv4_or_ipv6_network.description: Default is `198.18.0.0/24`.  IPv4 or IPv6 Network.
ipv4_or_ipv6_network.title: IPv4 or IPv6 Network

abstract.proxy_servers.description:
This dictionary provides the required configuration settings for the network proxy settings.

Optional fields are:
  * `http_server`
  * `https_server`
  * `no_proxy`
  * `proxy_password`
  * `username`
abstract.proxy_servers.title: OpenShift Container Platform (OCP) - Machine Network Gateway

http_server.description:
The HTTP proxy server to use.

This is optional, but if you have a proxy server, you can set it here.
http_server.title: Proxy HTTP Server

https_server.description:
The HTTPS proxy server to use.

This is optional, but if you have a proxy server, you can set it here.
https_server.title: Proxy HTTPS Server

no_proxy.description: List of Bypass URL's or IP addresses/networks to exclude from proxying.
no_proxy.title: Bypass URLs

password.description: Default is `1`.  The Proxy Password Sensitive Variable Identifier.  Only required if proxy requires authentication.  A number Between 1-64 to denote the variables proxy_password_[1-64].  i.e. `export proxy_password_1='cisco123'`.
password.title: Proxy Password

username.description: Username for Proxy Authentication.  Only required if proxy requires authentication.
username.title: Proxy Username

abstract.ssh_public_key.description: SSH public key to assign.  A number Between 1-64 to denote the variables ssh_public_key_[1-64].  i.e. `export ssh_public_key_1='ssh-ed25519 AAAAC...'`.
abstract.ssh_public_key.title: SSH Public Key

cisco_ai_pods.description:
This dictionary provides the required configuration settings for Cisco AI Pods.

Optional Fields are:
  * `hyperfabric`
  * `intersight`
  * `openshift`
  * `pure_storage`
  * `vast`
cisco_ai_pods.title: Cisco AI Pods

openshift.description:
This dictionary defines the OpenShift Container Platform (OCP) deployment settings.

Required Fields are:
  * `cluster_name`
  * `file_storage_class`
  * `install`
  * `operators`
openshift.title: OpenShift Container Platform (OCP) deployment settings

file_storage_class.description:
Default is `nfs-1`.  The File Storage Class is required for the Ansible Automation Platform Operator installation.

The name must be unique within the cluster domain and can consist of lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. It must start with a letter and end with a letter or number.
file_storage_class.title: OpenShift File Storage Class

openshift.cluster_name.description:
Default is `cluster-1`.  OpenShift Cluster Name.  Keep cluster names under 24 characters to prevent issues with generated subdomain names and API object limits.

The cluster name must be unique within the cluster domain and can consist of lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. It must start with a letter and end with a letter or number.
openshift.cluster_name.title: OpenShift Cluster Name

openshift.install.description:
This dictionary defines the OpenShift Container Platform (OCP) install options.

Required Fields are:
  * `bare_metal`
openshift.install.title: OpenShift Container Platform (OCP) install options

openshift.install.bare_metal.description:
This dictionary provides the required configuration settings for Cisco AI Pods - RedHat Openshift cluster deployment.

Required Fields are:`cluster_name`
  * `cluster_domain`
  * `cluster_networking`
  * `cluster_version`
  * `iso_web_server`
  * `installed_memory`
  * `ssh_public_key`

Optional fields are:`cpu_architecture`
  * `dns_search_domains`
  * `dns_servers`
  * `iso`
  * `ntp_servers`
  * `proxy_servers`
openshift.install.bare_metal.title: OpenShift Container Platform (OCP) - Bare Metal Provisioning

iso.description:
Default is `full`. Defines the ISO image type for the deployment.

Options are:
  * `full`
  * `minimal`
iso.title: ISO Image Type

servers.description:
This array provides the individual host configurations.

Required fields are:
  * `cimc`
  * `interfaces`
  * `hostname`
  * `role`
servers.title: OpenShift Container Platform (OCP) - BareMetal - Servers

openshift.install.bare_metal.servers.description:
This array provides the individual host configurations.

Required fields are:
  * `cimc`
  * `interfaces`
  * `hostname`
  * `role`
openshift.install.bare_metal.servers.title: OpenShift Container Platform (OCP) - BareMetal - Servers

iso.description:
Default is `full`. Defines the ISO image type for the deployment.

Options are:
  * `full`
  * `minimal`
iso.title: ISO Image Type

openshift.install.cluster_networking.description:
This dictionary provides the required configuration settings for RedHat Openshift cluster network configuration.

Required Fields are:
  * `api`
  * `ingress`
  * `machine_network_gateway`

Optional fields are:
  * `container_network_type`
  * `container_network_version`
  * `routes`
  * `service_network`
openshift.install.cluster_networking.title: OpenShift Container Platform (OCP) - Networking

container_network_type.description: Default is `OVNKubernetes`. Defines the Container Network Interface (CNI) for the deployment.
container_network_type.title: Container Network Interface (CNI)

container_network_version.description: Default is `1.17.9`.  OpenShift Container Networking Intersight (CNI) Version.
container_network_version.title: OpenShift Container Networking Intersight (CNI) Version

routes.description:
This array provides the host routing configuration.  This is defined at the cluster level and will be assigned to the individual nodes.

Required fields are:
  * `destination`
  * `gateway`
  * `interface_id`
routes.title: OpenShift Container Platform (OCP) - Networking - Routes

openshift.install.cluster_networking.api.description:
This dictionary provides the required configuration settings for RedHat Openshift cluster API addressing.

Optional fields are:
  * `v4`
  * `v6`
openshift.install.cluster_networking.api.title: OpenShift Container Platform (OCP) - Networking - API

openshift.install.cluster_networking.clu.description:
This dictionary provides the required configuration settings for RedHat Openshift cluster network addressing.  The cluster network refers to the interconnected system of logical and physical links that enable communication within a Kubernetes cluster, adhering to the Kubernetes networking model.

Optional fields are:
  * `v4_cidr`
  * `v4_host_prefix`
  * `v6_cidr`
  * `v6_host_prefix`
openshift.install.cluster_networking.clu.title: OpenShift Container Platform (OCP) - Cluster Network

v4_cidr.description: Default is `10.128.0.0/14`.  OpenShift Cluster Network - IPv4 CIDR address.  Refers to the Pod Network CIDR, which is the IP address range from which individual Pods within the cluster are allocated IP addresses.
v4_cidr.title: OpenShift Cluster Network - IPv4 CIDR address

v4_host_prefix.description: Default is `23`.  OpenShift Cluster Network - IPv4 Host Prefix.  It defines the subnet prefix length assigned to each individual node within the cluster's overall network CIDR.
v4_host_prefix.title: OpenShift Cluster Network - IPv4 Host Prefix

v6_cidr.description: Default is `2001:db8:128::/48`.  OpenShift Cluster Network - IPv6 CIDR address.  Refers to the Pod Network CIDR, which is the IP address range from which individual Pods within the cluster are allocated IP addresses.
v6_cidr.title: OpenShift Cluster Network - IPv6 CIDR address

v6_host_prefix.description: Default is `48`.  OpenShift Cluster Network - IPv6 Host Prefix.  It defines the subnet prefix length assigned to each individual node within the cluster's overall network CIDR.
v6_host_prefix.title: OpenShift Cluster Network - IPv6 Host Prefix

openshift.install.cluster_networking.ing.description:
This dictionary provides the required configuration settings for RedHat Openshift cluster ingress addressing.

Optional fields are:
  * `v4`
  * `v6`
openshift.install.cluster_networking.ing.title: OpenShift Container Platform (OCP) - Networking - Ingress

openshift.install.cluster_networking.mac.description:
This dictionary provides the required configuration settings for RedHat Openshift machine network gateway addressing.  A "k8s machine network" refers to the networking infrastructure within a Kubernetes cluster that allows all its components—including containers, pods, and nodes—to communicate with each other and with external services.

Optional fields are:
  * `v4`
  * `v6`
openshift.install.cluster_networking.mac.title: OpenShift Container Platform (OCP) - Machine Network Gateway

v4.description: OpenShift Machine Network Gateway - IPv4 Gateway/Prefix.  This is the frontend network for the cluster.  So we will define the gateway so that it isn't a requirement to also define the default route for the nodes.
v4.title: OpenShift Service Network - IPv4 Gateway address

v6.description: OpenShift Machine Network - IPv6 Gateway/Prefix.  This is the frontend network for the cluster.  So we will define the gateway so that it isn't a requirement to also define the default route for the nodes.
v6.title: OpenShift Machine Network - IPv6 Gateway address

openshift.install.cluster_networking.rou.description:
This dictionary provides the host routing configuration.  This is defined at the cluster level and will be assigned to the individual nodes.

Required fields are:
  * `destination`
  * `gateway`
  * `interface_id`
openshift.install.cluster_networking.rou.title: OpenShift Container Platform (OCP) - Machine Network Gateway

interface_index.description: Index for the interface identifier.  The identifier corresponds to the network interface on the host that will be used for this route.  The index is used to map the route to support nodes may have different interface names.
interface_index.title: Index for the interface identifier

openshift.install.cluster_networking.ser.description:
This dictionary provides the required configuration settings for RedHat Openshift service network addressing.   The "service network" refers to the system that enables communication between different parts of your application and exposes services both within and outside the cluster. It provides a stable and reliable way to access your applications, abstracting away the dynamic nature of individual Pods.

Optional fields are:
  * `v4_cidr`
  * `v6_cidr`
openshift.install.cluster_networking.ser.title: OpenShift Container Platform (OCP) - Service Network

v4_cidr.description: OpenShift Service Network - IPv4 CIDR address.  The Kubernetes Service Network CIDR refers to a specific range of IP addresses, defined using Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR) notation, that is reserved for the internal IP addresses of Kubernetes Services within a cluster.
v4_cidr.title: OpenShift Service Network - IPv4 CIDR address

v6_cidr.description: OpenShift Service Network - IPv6 CIDR address.  The Kubernetes Service Network CIDR refers to a specific range of IP addresses, defined using Classless Inter-Domain Routing (CIDR) notation, that is reserved for the internal IP addresses of Kubernetes Services within a cluster.
v6_cidr.title: OpenShift Service Network - IPv6 CIDR address

openshift.install.cpu_architecture.description: Default is `x86_64`. Defines the CPU Architecture for the physical servers.
openshift.install.cpu_architecture.title: OpenShift CPU Architecture

openshift.install.installed_memory.description:
This dictionary provides the installed memory in the control plane nodes and worker nodes to configure machine configuration reserved values.

Required Fields are:
  * `control_plane`
  * `worker`
openshift.install.installed_memory.title: ISO Web Server Configuration

control_plane.description: Default is `128`. Control Plane Memory in GB.
control_plane.title: Control Plane Memory in GB

worker.description: Default is `128`. Worker Memory in GB.
worker.title: Worker Memory in GB

openshift.install.iso_web_server.description:
This dictionary provides the required configuration settings for the web server that will host the installation ISO.

Required Fields are:
  * `image_base_url`
  * `image_upload_directory`
  * `web_server_ip`
openshift.install.iso_web_server.title: ISO Web Server Configuration

image_base_url.description: Default is `http://your-machine-ip:8080`.  Web Server Base URL.
image_base_url.title: Web Server Base URL

image_upload_directory.description: Default is `/var/www/html/isos`. Local file path for ISO upload directory.
image_upload_directory.title: Local File Path for ISO Upload Directory

web_server_ip.description: IPv4/IPv6 of the hosting web server.
web_server_ip.title: IPv4/IPv6 Web Server

pure_storage.description:
This dictionary defines the Pure Storage deployment settings.

Optional Fields are:
  * `bare_metal`
pure_storage.title: Pure Storage deployment settings

shared_services.description:
This dictionary provides the required configuration settings for shared services.

Optional Fields are:
  * `dns_search_domains`
  * `dns_servers`
  * `domain_name`
  * `ntp_servers`
  * `proxy_servers`
shared_services.title: Cisco AI Pods
